original_image_tags: The page appears to be the reverse side or a multi-generation copy of a typewritten memorandum. The text is faded, with significant ghosting and bleed-through from another page. The paper is aged, yellowed, with two punch holes at the top and some tearing/damage at the top edge. Multiple blue-purple rubber stamps are applied at various angles, overlapping the text and each other. A large black ink smudge or redaction obscures the right margin of the text body. The heading "Memorandum UNITED STATES GOVERNMENT" is visible in reverse at the top, suggesting bleed-through.

elements.description: Multiple blue ink stamps from the U.S. Dept. of Justice / F.B.I. with dates and times, including 'RECEIVED-TAMM', 'RECEIVED-HINCHL', 'RECEIVED-FOCSON', and 'RECEIVED-MUTUR'.

judge.reason: Description B provides specific quoted stamp text that Description A does not, creating a contradiction on visual content where one side hallucinates text the other does not see.
